childhood.familyBackground: Member of the Koo family, a prominent Korean business dynasty. Son of Koo Ja-gyung (former Goldstar chairman) and grandson of Koo In-hoi (founder of Lucky-Goldstar, now LG Group). Brother of Koo Bon-moo, who served as LG Group Chairman.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 한국의 주요 재벌 가문 구씨 가문의 일원. 구자경 전 금성사 회장의 아들이고 럭키금성(현 LG그룹) 창립자 구인회의 손자. 구본무 LG그룹 회장의 형
childhood.education: Education background not extensively documented in public sources
childhood.educationKo: 공개 자료에 광범위한 교육 배경이 기록되지 않음
childhood.earlyLife: Koo Bon-neung was born on March 26, 1949, into the prominent Koo family. He entered the LG corporate system in 1976, initially at Lucky Goldstar Trading (now LG Trading), working his way up through executive positions at LG Electronics and various affiliated companies.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1949년 3월 26일 태어난 구본능은 유명한 구씨 가문의 일원입니다. 1976년 럭키금성상사(현 LG상사)에 입사하여 LG전자와 여러 계열사의 임원으로 승진했습니다.

careerTimeline.event: Joined Lucky Goldstar Trading (now LG Trading) as employee
Moved to Goldstar (now LG Electronics) as director
Promoted to vice president of Sangnong Enterprises (now Heesung Electronics)
Became vice chairman of Heesung Metal
Led the independence of 8 affiliated companies from LG Group, establishing Heesung Group as independent conglomerate
careerTimeline.eventKo: LG그룹으로부터 8개 계열사를 독립시켜 희성그룹을 독립적인 재벌로 설립

careerTimeline.event: Became founding chairman of Heesung Group
Served as president of Korean Baseball Organization

quotes.text: Even if a company creates great value and profit, if this is achieved through anti-social behavior, the company's life is severed. Corporate social responsibility is paramount.
quotes.textKo: 훌륭한 가치와 이윤을 만들어내도 이것이 반사회적 행위를 통해 이루어지면 기업의 생명이 단절됩니다. 기업의 사회적 책임이 가장 중요합니다.
quotes.context: On corporate ethics and social responsibility

personalTraits.knownFor: Chairman of Heesung Group, a mid-sized conglomerate spun off from LG Group in 1996. Known as a member of the prominent Koo business family and for his rational, diligent management style. Led the independence of Heesung Group from LG while maintaining stable business relationships with the parent company.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 1996년 LG그룹으로부터 분리된 중견 재벌 희성그룹의 회장. 저명한 구씨 사업 가문의 일원으로 알려져 있으며 합리적이고 부지런한 경영 스타일로 인정받고 있습니다. 모회사와의 안정적인 사업 관계를 유지하면서 희성그룹의 독립을 주도했습니다.
